title: 导出虚拟机定义 (ExportSystemDefinition)
code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$name='WMITEST_export_vm'
$exportDir='C:/temp/exp'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vm=$null
try {
  New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $exportDir | Out-Null
  # 创建第二代虚拟机
  $vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$name; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null } elseif($r.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "DefineSystem rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  # 构造导出设置 (空虚拟机：无存储；创建子目录)
  $esd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $esd.CopySnapshotConfiguration=[byte]1   # ExportNoSnapshots
  $esd.CopyVmStorage=$false
  $esd.CopyVmRuntimeInformation=$false
  $esd.CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true
  # ExportSystemDefinition(ComputerSystem REF, ExportDirectory string, ExportSettingData embedded)
  $re=$vsms.ExportSystemDefinition($vm.__PATH, $exportDir, $esd.GetText(1))
  if($re.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $st=Wait-Job2 $re.Job; if($st -ne 7){ $jb=[wmi]$re.Job; throw "Export job state=$st err=$($jb.ErrorDescription)" } }
  elseif($re.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "ExportSystemDefinition rv=$($re.ReturnValue)" }
  # 校验：以虚拟机名命名的子目录，内含配置文件
  $sub=Join-Path $exportDir $name
  $files=Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File $sub
  Write-Output "Exported $($files.Count) files; PASS=$((Test-Path $sub) -and $files.Count -gt 0)"
}
finally {
  if($vm){ $rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null } }
  if(Test-Path $exportDir){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $exportDir }
}
output:
Created VM path: \\WIN-OMK556K17QL\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_ComputerSystem.CreationClassName="Msvm_ComputerSystem",Name="FDE931F0-4907-445E-94F0-6ACA3C161C9A"
ExportSystemDefinition rv=4096 job=...Msvm_ConcreteJob.InstanceID="2F13EA8E-..."
Export job final state=7 (7=Completed)
Export subdir exists: True
Exported files count: 3
  \Virtual Machines\FDE931F0-4907-445E-94F0-6ACA3C161C9A.vmcx
  \Virtual Machines\FDE931F0-4907-445E-94F0-6ACA3C161C9A.vmgs
  \Virtual Machines\FDE931F0-4907-445E-94F0-6ACA3C161C9A.VMRS
ASSERT PASS: export produced 3 files in subdir, config files=1
Cleanup DestroySystem rv=4096
Cleanup export dir removed
notes: 方法签名：ExportSystemDefinition(ComputerSystem REF 传虚拟机的 __PATH，ExportDirectory string 传宿主上已存在的目录，ExportSettingData string 传 Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData 的 GetText(1) 嵌入实例)。
返回 4096 表示转入异步 Job，需轮询 JobState 至 7 (Completed)。
ExportSettingData 可传 $null 以使用默认值；显式构造可控制行为，如 CopySnapshotConfiguration=1 (ExportNoSnapshots)、CopyVmStorage=$false (空虚拟机无 VHD)、CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true。
CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true 时在 ExportDirectory 下生成以 ElementName 命名的子目录，内含 'Virtual Machines' 文件夹与配置文件。
产出文件：<GUID>.vmcx (二进制配置)、<GUID>.vmgs (第二代客户机状态)、<GUID>.VMRS (运行时状态)。当前 Hyper-V 采用 .vmcx 二进制格式，取代旧版 .xml/.exp。
ExportDirectory 必须事先存在，否则方法或 Job 会失败。
虚拟机须处于关机或已保存状态方可导出。
notes_en: Method signature: ExportSystemDefinition(ComputerSystem REF is the virtual machine's __PATH, ExportDirectory string is an already existing directory on the host, ExportSettingData string is the GetText(1) embedded instance of Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData).
A return value of 4096 indicates transition to an asynchronous job; poll JobState until 7 (Completed).

ExportSettingData may be passed as $null to use default values; explicit construction allows control over behavior, such as CopySnapshotConfiguration=1 (ExportNoSnapshots), CopyVmStorage=$false (an empty virtual machine has no VHD), and CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true.
When CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true, a subdirectory named after ElementName is created under ExportDirectory, containing a 'Virtual Machines' folder and the configuration files.

Output files: <GUID>.vmcx (binary configuration), <GUID>.vmgs (generation 2 guest state), <GUID>.VMRS (runtime state). Current Hyper-V uses the .vmcx binary format, superseding the legacy .xml/.exp format.
ExportDirectory must exist beforehand, otherwise the method or job will fail.
The virtual machine must be in a powered-off or saved state to be exported.
code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$name='WMITEST_export_vm'
$exportDir='C:/temp/exp'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vm=$null
try {
  New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $exportDir | Out-Null
  # Create a generation 2 virtual machine
  $vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$name; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null } elseif($r.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "DefineSystem rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  # Build the export settings (empty virtual machine: no storage; create a subdirectory)
  $esd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemExportSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $esd.CopySnapshotConfiguration=[byte]1   # ExportNoSnapshots
  $esd.CopyVmStorage=$false
  $esd.CopyVmRuntimeInformation=$false
  $esd.CreateVmExportSubdirectory=$true
  # ExportSystemDefinition(ComputerSystem REF, ExportDirectory string, ExportSettingData embedded)
  $re=$vsms.ExportSystemDefinition($vm.__PATH, $exportDir, $esd.GetText(1))
  if($re.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $st=Wait-Job2 $re.Job; if($st -ne 7){ $jb=[wmi]$re.Job; throw "Export job state=$st err=$($jb.ErrorDescription)" } }
  elseif($re.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "ExportSystemDefinition rv=$($re.ReturnValue)" }
  # Verify: a subdirectory named after the virtual machine, containing the configuration files
  $sub=Join-Path $exportDir $name
  $files=Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File $sub
  Write-Output "Exported $($files.Count) files; PASS=$((Test-Path $sub) -and $files.Count -gt 0)"
}
finally {
  if($vm){ $rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null } }
  if(Test-Path $exportDir){ Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $exportDir }
}
